pages.title: Zombie
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 2 | $(b)Range:$() 1$(br)The basic melee grunt. Moves toward you and attacks. Baby zombies are faster (+2 speed) and smaller. Armed zombies hit harder. Watch for groups - they can overwhelm you!

pages.title: Skeleton & Stray
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 2 | $(b)Range:$() 3$(br)Ranged attackers that try to keep their distance. Skeletons shoot arrows; Strays apply slowness. They will retreat if you get too close, then shoot from safety.

pages.title: Spider
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 3 | $(b)Size:$() 2x2$(br)Fast predator that can pounce! Spiders take up 4 tiles and move quickly. They leap to close distance and can attack from further away. Target them early before they close in.

pages.title: Creeper
pages.text: $(b)Speed:$() 2 | $(b)Special:$() Explode$(br)THE most dangerous common enemy. Creepers walk up and start their fuse. After priming, they EXPLODE dealing massive AoE damage to everything nearby - including other mobs! Keep your distance!
